'''zhatuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoblock|pseudoblock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoblock|pseudoblock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhatuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhætizhith|zhætizhith]] || [[word:zhætizhij|zhætizhij]] || [[word:zhætizhish|zhætizhish]] || [[word:zhætizhi|zhætizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhatutuzhuth|zhatutuzhuth]] || [[word:zhatutuzhuj|zhatutuzhuj]] || [[word:zhatutuzhush|zhatutuzhush]] || [[word:zhatutuzhu|zhatutuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhatuzhuth|zhatuzhuth]] || [[word:zhatuzhuj|zhatuzhuj]] || [[word:zhatuzhush|zhatuzhush]] || [[word:zhatuzhu|zhatuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhatufzhuth|zhatufzhuth]] || [[word:zhatufzhuj|zhatufzhuj]] || [[word:zhatufzhush|zhatufzhush]] || [[word:zhatufzhuf|zhatufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhatuzhuthu|zhatuzhuthu]] || [[word:zhatuzhuju|zhatuzhuju]] || [[word:zhatuzhushu|zhatuzhushu]] || [[word:zhatuzhuku|zhatuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhatuzhuth|zhatuzhuth]] || [[word:zhatuzhuj|zhatuzhuj]] || [[word:zhatuzhush|zhatuzhush]] || [[word:zhatuzhu|zhatuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhatuzhuthul|zhatuzhuthul]] || [[word:zhatuzhujul|zhatuzhujul]] || [[word:zhatuzhushul|zhatuzhushul]] || [[word:zhatuzhukul|zhatuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhatuzhuthuthu|zhatuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:zhatuzhujuju|zhatuzhujuju]] || [[word:zhatuzhushushu|zhatuzhushushu]] || [[word:zhatuzhuku|zhatuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhatuzhuthun|zhatuzhuthun]] || [[word:zhatuzhujun|zhatuzhujun]] || [[word:zhatuzhushun|zhatuzhushun]] || [[word:zhatuzhukun|zhatuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhatuzhuthuoro|zhatuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:zhatuzhujuoro|zhatuzhujuoro]] || [[word:zhatuzhushuoro|zhatuzhushuoro]] || [[word:zhatuzhukuoro|zhatuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
